title: Senior Investment Banker at Bandhan Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Bandhan Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bandhan Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bandhan Bank:
Bandhan Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank!
